title: Better Lodestones
body:
# Better Lodestones

This datapack aims to improve lodestones without taking away from the vanilla feel.

## Features
- ### Attuned Compass
  - More expensive version of the compass, can be used to teleport the player to an attached lodestone
  - <details>
      <summary>recipe</summary> 

      ![crafting recipe for the attuned compass](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b1309cdc0af6e336667f77a190d10bd889ef2b92.png)

    </details>
- ### Improved Lodestone Crafting Recipe 
  - Now crafted with an iron block in the center instead of a netherite ingot, the lodestone is cheaper and more accesible
